name: Whipped Cream Graham Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream with the sweetener until stiff peaks form.
2. Place one square of graham cracker on a platter and spread it heavily with whipped cream.
3. Place a second square on top of the first, also spread heavily with whipped cream.
4. Continue stacking squares, spreading each heavily with whipped cream until there are four layers in total.
5. Gently press down on the top layer to allow excess cream to squeeze out onto the sides.
6. Spread the excess cream along the sides.
7. Repeat steps 2-5 to create a second stack of eight layers (2 squares by 4 squares).
8. Use additional whipped cream to smooth over all the tops and sides.
9. Refrigerate for several hours before serving, allowing the crackers to soften.
10. Optionally, sprinkle with sprinkles for added flavor without much extra sugar.
Note: If you don't have time or inclination to whip the cream, use a pressurized can of whipped cream instead.
